Details: RDX is readily oxidized by UV radiation. Based on the results of one study with different initial RDX concentrations ranging from 23 to 55 ppm, UV irradiation oxidized 70 percent of the RDX initial concentration in 10 minutes and completely oxidized RDX in 25 minutes. The initial concentration had no significant effect on the reaction rates [1714].  The pH was low relative to typical drinking water treatment conditions.
